comment.body:
In lots of market that I traded, what we typically ll see is distribution-> decline -> fake out or pump into no man’s land.
What market did yesterday told a very different story

And prices is once again coming back to the distribution value, with higher high-> higher low structure

We even saw double distribution last week (tpo concept), it should signal at least some kind of top but we saw different thing
